rationale: Hard pass for Push'em All. The Dragon Ball anime aesthetic (gold/orange/navy, detailed character animation, shonen power-fantasy framing) clashes with the game's minimalist 3D stickman look and bright blue/green/red palette, and a charged-fist anime attack does not communicate the swipe-to-push crowd-control loop at all. Audience also skews older/male anime-fan rather than the broad all-ages hypercasual base, plus there's obvious IP risk using Goku — do not greenlight, even as a stylistic reference.
